aged-care-in-hospital.name: Elderly stuck in hospital beds
aged-care-in-hospital.description: Bevan's running record of pressing the Government on older Western Australians left in hospital beds because there are not enough residential aged-care beds for them to move to.

regional-aged-care.name: The regional aged care gap
regional-aged-care.description: Older Western Australians in the regions who cannot get aged care where they live: home care, workforce, assessments and services funded for the city first.

forestry.name: Forestry and the timber transition
forestry.description: The scrutiny of the native forest transition and what it is doing to timber towns, plantation supply, sandalwood, and the workers and shires left behind.

mrshs.name: Margaret River Senior High School
mrshs.description: The push for Stage 2 at a school built for 650, now teaching more than 1,200, and still waiting on the build.

mr-hospital.name: Margaret River Hospital
mr-hospital.description: The push to release the business case and fund the upgrade of a hospital serving a fast-growing, ageing tourism region.

firearms-regulations.name: Firearms Regulations 2024
firearms-regulations.description: Bevan's case that the 2024 firearms rules are unworkable for the regional people who rely on firearms as everyday tools for farming, animal welfare and pest control.

ct-scanner.name: CT scanner at Manjimup Hospital
ct-scanner.description: Bevan's push for a CT scanner at Manjimup Hospital, so people in the southern forests are not sent hours down the road for a scan the region should be able to do close to home.

womens-refuge.name: A women's refuge for Warren-Blackwood
womens-refuge.description: Bevan's sustained case that Warren-Blackwood has no women's refuge while hundreds of millions go to metro services, and the local site sits ready and waiting on the Government.

regional-schools.name: Funding for regional public schools
regional-schools.description: The fight to keep funding in regional public schools: the $36 million taken from public education, the schools left off the build list, and facilities that do not match enrolments.

town-water.name: Water holding back regional towns
town-water.description: Regional towns whose growth and housing are stalled by water: developments held up, lots sold with no supply, and towns with a metre of rain a year and no permanent water.

shire-rates.name: The revenue taken from our shires
shire-rates.description: The wealth generated in the regions and taken to Treasury: shire rates legislated away, mining and plantation revenue rerouted, and a voluntary payment where rates used to be.

emergency-care.name: Emergency and urgent care in the regions
emergency-care.description: Ambulance funding falling as demand rises, missing urgent care clinics, an emergency department under a leaking roof, and the country's longest waits and drives.

biosecurity.name: Biosecurity and pest threats
biosecurity.description: Bevan's push to fund biosecurity before the crisis, not after: the borer eradication lost, and the case to stay varroa-free while the effort is still winnable.

fuel-prices.name: Fuel prices and supply in the regions
fuel-prices.description: Fuel in the regions: no diesel for the harvest, prices that hit the regions hardest, and a region left flying blind without price transparency.
